title: So Eva 00GNR in 23 is Rei halting 3i
display_title: So Eva 00GNR in 23 is Rei halting 3i
wikitext:
[]: So, Eva-00>>GNR in 23' is Rei halting 3i?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:09 am Armisael merging with 00 means Adam's soul+offspring+clone+Lilith's soul.. is that enough to make for 3i? The only difference between this GNR and the later GNR is, it has a halo.. so it's the Adam-based rendition of 3i?

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:14 am I don't think it's enough to make 3i, but it is probably something similar to an Angel. Plus, Adam's soul was never in that.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:18 am Adam's soul was in the angel (I know the idea of Adam's soul going through every angel is contested).

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:20 am No, Adam's soul is in Kaworu. Atleast I think. It's the merging of one of Adam's offspring and Adam that causes Third Impact. Unless you count Unit-00 as Adam, then yes, it would be possible. But, by extension does that mean that if a human were to walk into Lilith, a human 3i would happen?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:23 am The CI says it was put straight into Kaworu at some point after 2I.

[]: Re: So, Eva-00>>GNR in 23' is Rei halting 3i?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:25 am FallenTabris wrote: Armisael merging with 00 means Adam's soul+offspring+clone+Lilith's soul..

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:05 am 23'-GNR is... dubious. The halo after the explosion I can see as a flourish perhaps, but what about the one that forms as 00 > GNR before anything blows up? For that matter, if the armor and flesh of 00 was instantly transfigured into the GNR, what exactly blew up? Why would the plug not be affected by a similar transformation?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:23 am NemZ wrote: The halo after the explosion I can see as a flourish perhaps, but what about the one that forms as 00 > GNR before anything blows up?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:30 am This is just an example of the kind of problems that occur when a retcon takes place... somebody always forgets to change a minor detail.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:37 am NemZ wrote: This is just an example of the kind of problems that occur when a retcon takes place... somebody always forgets to change a minor detail.

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 11:23 am Armisael merging with 00 means Adam's soul+offspring+clone+Lilith's soul.. is that enough to make for 3i? The only difference between this GNR and the later GNR is, it has a halo.. so it's the Adam-based rendition of 3i?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 11:38 am Twsa'teotu wrote: 3I involves (Lilith's soul + human body) + Adam's actual body +...Lilith's actual body

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:40 pm Reichu wrote: It doesn't require Adam at all. An Angel could use Lilith to trigger a 3I without. Seele also seemed to have no requirement for Adam in their 3I plans (just Adam derivatives). The 3I they started in EoE didn't even involve Lilith directly (the use of Eva-01 as a "medium" was mentioned, so perhaps Lilith would "participate" indirectly, somehow or other).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 4:45 pm Both Gendo and Seele had plans that were designed to work independently of one another (and of the original Spear of Longinus, for that matter...). So if either one had been allowed to complete without the interference of the other -- in theory, yes, an event would have occurred of sufficient global impact to be called an, errr, you know.
summary:
[]: So, Eva-00>>GNR in 23' is Rei halting 3i?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:09 am Armisael merging with 00 means Adam's soul+offspring+clone+Lilith's soul.. is that enough to make for 3i? The only difference between this GNR and the later GNR is, it has a halo.. so it's the Adam-based rendition of 3i?

[]:             Quote Post by Duke &raquo
